os.name: Windows 11 Home Single Language
os.reason: Windows 11 provides the latest gaming optimizations and DirectStorage support.

cpu.name: Intel(R) Core(TM) 7 240H
cpu.reason: 10 Physical Cores provide more than sufficient processing capability for real-time HUD, Vision processing, and background services.

ram.name: 16 GB
ram.reason: Sufficient memory for simultaneous game execution, overlay rendering, and Vision analysis.

gpu.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 Laptop GPU
gpu.reason: Supports all required NVIDIA APIs, Tensor cores for AI, and advanced rendering technologies.

storage.name: NVMe PM9C1a Samsung 1024GB
storage.reason: SSD storage ensures fast loading and smooth asset streaming.

features.name: Gaming Library
features.reason: Basic application features are supported on all hardware.

features.name: Vision Analysis
features.reason: Vision processing uses Tensor cores on RTX GPUs for real-time inference. Runs in fallback mode on GTX.

features.name: Future AI Assistant
features.reason: Cloud-based AI requires minimal local hardware.
